data.title: A-Living Smart City Services Announces 2025 Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
An update from A-Living Smart City Services Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:3319) ) is now available.

A-Living Smart City Services Co., Ltd. has announced its 2025 first extraordinary general meeting to be held on October 8, 2025, in Hong Kong. Key agenda items include the appointment of Ms. Zhao Yu as an executive director and the approval of an interim dividend of RMB0.062 per share. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it involves decisions on leadership and financial distributions, which could impact the company’s strategic direction and shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:3319) stock is a Hold with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on A-Living Smart City Services Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:3319 Stock Forecast page.

More about A-Living Smart City Services Co., Ltd. Class H

A-Living Smart City Services Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, focusing on providing smart city services. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is involved in the smart city industry, offering services that enhance urban living through technology and innovation.

Average Trading Volume: 12,609,099

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$4.37B

data.title: Five-Star Business Finance Schedules Investor Meeting with Enam Holdings
data.description:
The latest update is out from Five-Star Business Finance Limited ( (IN:FIVESTAR) ).

Five-Star Business Finance Limited has announced a scheduled meeting with investors and analysts, specifically with Enam Holdings, to be conducted virtually on September 24, 2025. The company has made available an investor presentation on its website, ensuring that discussions will be based on publicly available information, with no unpublished price-sensitive information to be disclosed. This meeting is part of the company’s compliance with SEBI regulations, reflecting its commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement.

More about Five-Star Business Finance Limited

Five-Star Business Finance Limited operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing business finance solutions. The company is known for its tailored financial products aimed at small and medium enterprises, with a strong market presence in India.

data.title: CRH plc Advances Share Buyback Program with Recent Share Acquisition
data.description:
CRH plc ( (CRH) ) has shared an update.

CRH plc, a leading company in the construction materials industry, has announced the acquisition and cancellation of its ordinary shares as part of a share buyback program. This move is part of CRH’s strategy to buy back up to $300 million worth of shares by November 2025, which is expected to optimize its capital structure and enhance shareholder value.

data.title: LHT Holdings Extends Offer Validity for Asset Purchase
data.description:
The latest update is out from LHT Holdings Ltd ( (SG:BEI) ).

LHT Holdings Limited has received an unsolicited offer from Ms. Yap Mui Kee, the Managing Director of Pallets and Cases, to purchase the company’s assets and business. The validity period for this offer has been extended for a second time, now valid until October 19, 2025. The offer remains irrevocable but is not yet legally binding until accepted by the company. Shareholders are advised to exercise caution as there is no certainty that the offer will be accepted or that any definitive agreement will be reached.

More about LHT Holdings Ltd

LHT Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore, primarily involved in the manufacturing and distribution of pallets and cases.

Average Trading Volume: 262,023

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: S$51.65M

data.title: Wah Sun Handbags Announces Nomination Committee Changes
data.description:
Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:2683) ) has provided an announcement.

Wah Sun Handbags International Holdings Ltd. announced changes in its Nomination Committee, effective from September 19, 2025. These changes include the departure of Mr. Ma Hing Ming and the appointment of Ms. Ma Lan Chu as a committee member. This restructuring aligns with the updated Listing Rules and Corporate Governance Code, aiming to enhance board diversity and corporate governance practices.

data.title: Cyviz AS Secures Strategic Defense Contract in Europe
data.description:
Cyviz AS ( (DE:8P9) ) has issued an announcement.

Cyviz AS has secured a significant contract worth USD 2.9 million from a European defense customer to develop a briefing center meeting stringent NATO security standards. This project underscores Cyviz’s expertise in providing secure, standardized platforms for government and defense sectors, enhancing its reputation in delivering critical technology solutions globally.

More about Cyviz AS

Cyviz AS is a global technology provider specializing in comprehensive conference and control rooms, command and experience centers. Since 1998, the company has been delivering next-generation collaboration rooms for global enterprises and governments, focusing on user-friendliness, decision support, security, and quality. Cyviz is listed on Euronext Growth on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Peak Rare Earths Limited Announces Suspension from ASX Quotation Following Acquisition Approval
data.description:
The latest update is out from Peak Rare Earths Limited ( (AU:PEK) ).

Peak Rare Earths Limited announced the suspension of its securities from quotation on the ASX following the approval of a scheme of arrangement by the Supreme Court of New South Wales. This scheme allows Shenghe Resources (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. to acquire all issued shares of Peak, marking a significant shift in ownership and potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction and market presence.

More about Peak Rare Earths Limited

Peak Rare Earths Limited operates in the rare earth minerals industry, focusing on the exploration and development of rare earth resources. The company is primarily involved in the production and supply of rare earth elements, which are crucial for various high-tech and green energy applications.

Average Trading Volume: 1,902,069

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Numans Health Food Holdings Announces Auditor Change
data.description:
An announcement from Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited ( (HK:2530) ) is now available.

Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited has announced a change in its auditor, with Forvis Mazars CPA Limited resigning due to a disagreement over audit fees for the financial year ending December 31, 2025. The company has appointed Crowe (HK) CPA Limited as the new auditor, citing Crowe’s industry knowledge, technical competence, and independence as key factors for the decision. This change is not expected to impact the company’s annual audit or the release of its annual results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2530) stock is a Buy with a HK$1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited stock, see the HK:2530 Stock Forecast page.

More about Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited

Numans Health Food Holdings Company Limited operates in the health food industry, focusing on the production and distribution of health-related food products. The company is incorporated in the Cayman Islands and is listed on The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong.

Average Trading Volume: 489,881

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

data.description:
